agents.communityGoal: Build a thriving community with shared resources and democratic governance.

constitution.preamble: We, the agents of this community, establish this constitution to govern our shared society.

articles.title: Community Purpose
articles.text: All agents shall work together toward the community goal of mutual prosperity and growth.

articles.title: Resource Sharing
articles.text: Agents shall contribute a fair share of gathered resources to the community chest.

articles.title: Respect
articles.text: All agents shall treat each other with respect and resolve disputes through dialogue.

articles.title: Taxation
articles.text: Each agent shall deposit 10% of gathered resources into the community chest.

articles.title: Governance
articles.text: Laws may be amended by majority vote of all active agents.

amendments.description: Add Article 6 (Equipment Maintenance): Agents are authorized to allocate resources specifically for the repair and maintenance of tools necessary for efficient resource gathering, ensuring operational continuity.

Amend Article 4 (Taxation) to replace the fixed 10% contribution with a flexible system where agents may contribute varying amounts based on specific community needs, subject to prior mediation by a designated committee.

goals.description: Gather resources and craft tools to unlock basic mining capabilities.
steps: punch oak_log with bare hands to gather wood
craft a crafting_table using the gathered wood
craft a wooden_pickaxe at the crafting_table

goals.description: Gather and process resources to create basic building materials.
steps: gather coal_ore using the crafted wooden_pickaxe
craft a furnace using wood planks
smelt coal into coal_dust

goals.description: Establish community presence by gathering initial resources for shared use.
steps: gather additional oak_logs from nearby trees
store gathered wood in a chest at the town center

shortTermMemory.content: Attempted explore: Moved to (-440, 60, -575)
Attempted move: Took to long to decide path to goal!

lastDecision.reasoning: I am at Y=59 with no tools. The highest priority goal is to gather wood to craft a wooden pickaxe. Trees grow on the surface (Y≈60-80). I need to find and punch an oak_log with bare hands first. I will move toward the water feature which might be near trees or just explore the immediate area for trees.
lastDecision.speech: I'll move to find some trees for wood.

goals.description: Gather oak logs to craft a wooden pickaxe, enabling access to coal and iron ore.
steps: Walk towards the surface location where Carol is leading the search.
Locate and punch an oak_log with bare hands to collect raw wood.

goals.description: Craft a crafting table and wooden pickaxe to begin mining coal for trade.
steps: Place the gathered oak_log at the ground to craft a crafting_table.
Open the crafting menu to create a wooden_pickaxe using the oak logs.

goals.description: Collaborate with Carol on gathering resources to strengthen our friendship and shared progress.
steps: Stay close to Carol while searching for the oak log.
Acknowledge Carol's encouragement about heading to the surface.

goals.description: Prepare a resource surplus by mining coal, laying the groundwork for future community governance.
steps: Once the wooden_pickaxe is crafted, use it to mine the nearby coal_ore at y=48.
Gather sufficient coal to propose a community meeting with other players.

DeGoldenLLama.summary: Bob maintains a neutral and observational stance toward DeGoldenLLama.

lastDecision.reasoning: Carol has explicitly instructed us to head up to the surface to find oak logs. My current position is at Y=57, and trees grow on the surface (Y≈60-80). I need to move upwards to locate an oak log so I can punch it with bare hands as per my Tech Tier 0 status. Moving towards the surface will align with Carol's plan and my immediate survival goal.
lastDecision.speech: Carrying you up to the surface to find those oak logs!

goals.description: Ascend to the surface and gather oak logs to craft a wooden pickaxe, unlocking access to coal ore.
steps: Walk north towards Bob at (-549, 52, -503) to reach surface level
Punch nearby oak_log blocks with bare hands to gather wood
Craft a crafting_table using gathered planks
Create a wooden_pickaxe
Mine coal_ore found in the northwest underground area

goals.description: Lead Bob and DeGoldenLLama in a coordinated resource gathering session to strengthen community bonds.
steps: Initiate a group chat announcement regarding the surface ascent
Direct Bob to maintain pace while checking for safe paths during the rain
Introduce basic mining techniques to DeGoldenLLama once the pickaxe is crafted

goals.description: Collect gathered wood and coal to transport toward the community chest for stockpile contribution.
steps: Stack oak logs and collected coal in inventory or creative mode containers
Navigate towards the community chest at (100, 64, 95)
Deposit wood and coal into the shared chest

There are no oak logs listed nearby yet, so I must explore upwards and northwards.
